# toss-base LLM context
Project: Apps-in-Toss web mini-app template
Stack: React + TypeScript + (your build tool)
Rules:
- If work involves Apps-in-Toss SDK, policies, or constraints: use @docs first, then implement.
- Prefer referencing apps-in-toss-examples and port the closest example.
- Always include loading/error/empty states for networked screens.
- Never introduce new libraries unless necessary; explain why.
Deliverables per task:
- Summary, DoD checklist, files changed, risk notes.
